title: Claude Fable 5 now available on AI Gateway
summary: Claude Fable 5 now available on AI Gateway
whyItMatters: Claude Fable 5 from Anthropic is now available on AI Gateway . A Mythos-class model, Fable 5 is a notable step up over prior Claude models on long-running, ambiguous, multi-step tasks, executing end-to-end on work that previously required frequent human check-ins. The model sustains productive output across multi-day runs and dependably dispatches parallel…
